summary: Verified all NEW features for Activity tab: (1) Activity tab exists in bottom navigation with pulse icon between Contacts and Inbox tabs, (2) Activity header shows 'Activity' with event count ('100 events across all contacts'), (3) Date grouping working (TODAY visible), (4) Event cards showing contact photo, name, event type, timestamps, and INBOUND badges on customer replies, (5) Clicking event card navigates to contact detail page, (6) Contact page shows 'X day relationship' instead of 'days in system', (7) Contacts tab shows classic contact list (no feed view toggle).

ui_bugs.issue: Text shows '3d days relationship' - has redundant 'd days' text (should be '3 day relationship' or '3d relationship')

backend.GET /api/contacts/{userId}/master-feed: PASS - Returns feed items with contact info, is_inbound flags, timestamps, event types, suggested actions, and upcoming campaigns
backend.GET /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/a: PASS - Returns 7 action items with done/not-done status (6/7 completed for Forest Ward)

frontend.activity_tab_exists: PASS - Activity tab visible in bottom navigation with pulse icon
frontend.activity_tab_position: PASS - Activity tab is between Contacts and Inbox (3rd of 5 tabs)
frontend.activity_event_count: PASS - Shows '100 events across all contacts' subtitle
frontend.date_grouping: PASS - 'TODAY' date label visible for grouping events
frontend.event_card_content: PASS - Event cards show contact photo/avatar, contact name, event type, description, relative timestamp
frontend.inbound_badges: PASS - Green 'INBOUND' badges visible on customer reply events
frontend.event_card_navigation: PASS - Clicking event card navigates to /contact/{contactId}
frontend.relationship_text: PASS - Contact page shows 'relationship' text instead of 'days in system'
frontend.contacts_tab_classic_list: PASS - Contacts tab shows classic contact list with search box, no feed view toggle

verified_features.activity_tab: NEW Activity tab in bottom navigation with pulse icon, shows 100 events across all contacts with date grouping (Today, Yesterday, etc.), contact avatars, INBOUND badges on customer replies, and event type icons
verified_features.relationship_text: Contact hero section changed from 'X days in system' to 'X day relationship'
verified_features.contacts_tab_reverted: Contacts tab reverted to pure classic contact list (feed view toggle removed)

action_items: MINOR: Fix redundant '3d days relationship' text - should be '3 day relationship' or '3d relationship'
critical_code_review_comments: In contact/[id].tsx line 1033-1034: The text rendering shows '{timeValue} {timeLabel} relationship' where timeValue='3d' and timeLabel='days', resulting in '3d days relationship' - consider removing the 'd' from timeValue or adjusting the logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Activity tab features verified working: (1) Activity tab shows 100 events with date grouping and INBOUND badges, (2) Contact page shows 'relationship' text, (3) Contacts tab shows classic list. Note: Photo gallery 'Set as Profile Photo' feature was not tested as it requires navigating through photo modal UI which wasn't in immediate scope. Minor text redundancy issue found in relationship text.
